_comment: Source-of-truth enum for orchestrator_v1.schema.json agent_assignment.subagent. Adding/removing roles requires schema-version bump per implplan §B.impl.3 + §D.impl.4. Hand-authored alongside the nine agents/*.md definitions per plan §D.8 cross-cutting rule #4 (no LLM emission). v2 (2026-05-23): added 'qna' for the question-and-answer subagent (operator-supplied question → answer + supporting evidence; distinct from 'qa' which is the adversarial-review subagent). v3 (2026-07-18): added 'eli5', the plainspeak-translation lens (finds nothing new; distinct from both qa and qna per docs/feedback_eli5_terminology.md). Roster membership makes eli5 planner-assignable; that assignment is legal but unsupported in v1 — eli5 is an operator lens, never a gate (commands/eli5.md).
